productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex  FT Grey Shoulderbag
description: The heritage line of adidas, the adidas originals, brings to you this copiously spacious handbag. Inspired by the retro style of the 70s and 80s, this cotton-polyester bag makes for a great addition to your casual wardrobe.Exterior made of 92% cotton and 8% polyester, with a 100% polyester inner liningOne main zippered compartment with a mobile pouch and an organiser pouchOne zippered compartment on the front with a pleat to create more spaceBranding in distressed print on the front and backWide handles made of synthetic twill tape for carrying easeSynthetic leather detailingCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
